title: BEM-1296 generator test
objective:
Create file governance/tests/run_workflow_generator_test.py with content import subprocess
import sys
from pathlib import Path

GENERATOR = Path('governance/tools/generate_governance_validation_workflow.py')
GENERATED = Path('governance/workflows_disabled/governance-validation-ci.generated.yml')
ACTIVE = Path('.github/workflows/governance-validation-ci.yml')


def main():
    errors = []
    proc = subprocess.run([sys.executable, str(GENERATOR)], text=True, capture_output=True)
    if proc.returncode != 0:
        errors.append('generator failed')
        errors.append(proc.stdout)
        errors.append(proc.stderr)
    if not GENERATED.exists():
        errors.append('generated disabled workflow missing')
    else:
        text = GENERATED.read_text(encoding='utf-8')
        for snippet in ['name: governance-validation-ci', 'on:', 'push:', 'pull_request:', 'jobs:', 'runs-on: ubuntu-latest']:
            if snippet not in text:
                errors.append(f'missing generated snippet: {snippet}')
        for snippet in ['schedule:', 'cron:', 'release_pass: true']:
            if snippet in text:
                errors.append(f'forbidden generated snippet: {snippet}')
    if ACTIVE.exists():
        errors.append('active governance workflow must not exist during generator test')
    if errors:
        print('FAIL workflow generator test')
        for error in errors:
            print(error)
        raise SystemExit(1)
    print('PASS workflow generator test')

if __name__ == '__main__':
    main()
